title: Unstable SMP Youtubers Enchants
description: You want a chaotic SMP mod? Here you go, that mod is the jackpot for you, it gives you the most chaotic and unbalanced enchants
body:
⚡ Unstable SMP Enchantments

What if your enchantments weren’t just stat boosts…
but pure chaos?

Unstable SMP Enchantments adds custom, character-inspired enchantments based on iconic Unstable SMP playstyles. Each enchantment brings unique combat mechanics, explosions, traps, and movement abilities into your world.

This is not vanilla-friendly.

This is unstable.

💣 Enchantments
🐦 TheobaldTheBird (Bow)

Every successful arrow hit has a chance (based on enchantment level) to spawn an explosive TNT Minecart under the target.

Yes. It explodes.

Higher level = higher chance.

💥 Wemmbu (Sword)

Hitting an enemy triggers an explosion.
Explosion strength scales with enchantment level.

Perfect for players who think subtlety is overrated.

🕸 Flamefrags (Sword)

On hit:

Spawns cobwebs under the enemy

Deals additional damage

Trap them. Burn them. Finish them.

🚀 ParrotX2 (Elytra)

Apply this enchantment to your Elytra.

While flying:

Right-click with an empty hand

Gain a forward boost (weaker than a normal firework)

No rockets needed. Just skill.

🎣 Spoke (Fishing Rod)

Hook an enemy with your fishing rod and:

Based on enchantment level, TNT spawns beneath them.

Fishing has never been this dangerous.

🔥 Clownpierce

Right-click to shoot a fireball.

Inspired by a Nether-dominating playstyle — aggressive, fiery, unstoppable.

⚠ Warning

Explosions are frequent.

PvP becomes unpredictable.

Your base is not safe.

Your friends will not trust you.

If you like chaotic SMP energy, explosive combat, and character-inspired abilities — this mod is for you.

Unstable worlds create unforgettable stories.
